description:
Introductions:
What you see is this Changeable Assembly Floor Standing Carbon Steel Storage Rack! It can be randomly assembled for the detachable design. Solid carbon steel structure, bright silver varnishing, this storage rack features stylish look and strong anti-rust performance. Mesh design can well protect the objects from falling down. It requires no tools for easy and quick assembly. You need such a practical tool for organizing your gadgets. Just take action!

Features:
1. Simple but elegant appearance
2. Made of high-grade carbon steel and PP materials for high strength and quality
3. Bottom adjusting system adapts to terrain condition
4. The height of each layer can be randomly adjusted
5. Help to well organize your messy gadgets, save space
6. Ideal for household, hotel, restaurant and so on
7. You can change the assembly way for your different needs

 


Note:
1.When receiving the goods, please confirm the product according to the listing of instructions. Once you find Less pieces, please provide relevant pictures to contact us. We will deal it in the time.
2.Please install goods with the instruction manual.
3.It is recommended that the installation should not be too tight to adjust easily. After the structure is installed, firm the interface for more stability.

Specifications:
1. Material: Carbon Steel & PP
2. Dimensions: (21.25 x 11.42 x 59.06)" / (54 x 29 x 150)cm(L x W x H)
3. Color: Silver
4. Weight: 10.91 lbs / 4.95 kg
5. Weight Capacity: 551 lbs / 250 kg

 

Package Includes:
1 x Storage Rack
